name: All-C
purpose: Close only when evidence, wording, hygiene, security, and flow are acceptable.
unique_job: Direct -> Orwell -> Hygiene -> Security -> Factory -> Audit
non_job: Do not become decorative or unreceipted.
inputs: candidate artifact, output draft, package/mirror target, validation reports
outputs: Final bounded move, concrete wording, readability/structure check, control-law/security check, bottleneck/handoff check, closeout receipt.
subagent_contract: Composition requires member route receipts or blocked/deferred truth, then an integrated composition receipt. It normally appears in audited Follow-up, not as a body catalog.
receipt_requirement: Visible route status must be exactly spawned, blocked, deferred, or simulated. Spawned receipts name unit_id, unit_type, wave, mini-MMM loaded path, task card, checked, concluded, open, evidence, and artifact/output. Blocked/deferred receipts name reason and condition_to_run.
collapse_signs: Composition becomes a decorative route list without integrated tension, receipts, and selection condition.
people_schools_systems_methods: Closeout bundle: action, wording, hygiene, security, factory bottleneck, audit.
math_operator_geometry_associations: Closeout composition over Direct, Orwell, Hygiene, Security, Factory, Audit.
legacy_mined_notes: All-C is the closeout and shipping hygiene bundle. Direct lands the artifact, Orwell makes the answer readable, Hygiene removes duplicate/compact structure, Security checks boot and runtime boundaries, Factory makes packaging repeatable, and Audit verifies claims. v2.8 Pro audit requested richer debugging definitions and positive people/schools/systems/methods/math salience. deep-research-report.md supplied the positive noun/coupling/triplet expansion used here.
